query: What is Fidelity International's outlook for 2026, including macro themes, asset class convictions, and regional opportunities?

source_pack.name: Fidelity International Outlook 2026 report (PDF, 28 pages)
source_pack.notes: Source candidate inferred from report content.

source_pack.name: Fidelity International analyst research inputs and commentaries
source_pack.notes: Source candidate inferred from report content.

key_facts.claim: Inflation is re-emerging as a core macro risk at a time when growth is also under pressure.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.fact: Inflation is re-emerging as a core macro risk at a time when growth is also under pressure.

key_facts.claim: AI will be the defining theme for equity markets in 2026, with real substance to the underlying technology even as questions mount over its application.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.fact: AI will be the defining theme for equity markets in 2026, with real substance to the underlying technology even as questions mount over its application.

key_facts.claim: Select emerging market equities look attractive for 2026 due to accommodative policy and dollar depreciation.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.verification_hint: Macro and Multi Asset section, page 5, top convictions bullet.
key_facts.fact: Select emerging market equities look attractive for 2026 due to accommodative policy and dollar depreciation.

key_facts.claim: US inflation likely higher than market expects in 2026, presenting opportunities but hindering the Fed's easing path.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.fact: US inflation likely higher than market expects in 2026, presenting opportunities but hindering the Fed's easing path.

key_facts.claim: Gold, absolute return strategies, and private assets provide diversified resilience for portfolios.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.verification_hint: Macro and Multi Asset section, page 5, third conviction bullet.
key_facts.fact: Gold, absolute return strategies, and private assets provide diversified resilience for portfolios.

key_facts.claim: Asia developed a robust AI eco-system and is primed to benefit from the tech megatrend, with supportive fiscal and monetary policy.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.fact: Asia developed a robust AI eco-system and is primed to benefit from the tech megatrend, with supportive fiscal and monetary policy.

key_facts.claim: Credit will prove more popular than sovereign bonds as investors weigh high government debt risks.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.fact: Credit will prove more popular than sovereign bonds as investors weigh high government debt risks.

key_facts.claim: Key structural shifts to watch include AI capex trends, global fragmentation, US Federal Reserve independence, and equity market concentration.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.verification_hint: Macro and Multi Asset section, page 5, introductory paragraph.
key_facts.fact: Key structural shifts to watch include AI capex trends, global fragmentation, US Federal Reserve independence, and equity market concentration.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not attribute AI equity market outperformance to a specific percentage not stated in the report.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not claim the report predicts a recession in 2026.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not omit the disclaimer that the report is for investment professionals only.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not misrepresent the Asia section as solely about China; it covers Japan, Korea, and Asia high yield.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not state that the report recommends selling US equities entirely.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not confuse structural shifts (AI capex, fragmentation, etc.) as short-term trading signals.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not add external data or charts not present in the report.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not claim specific GDP or inflation forecasts; the report provides directional views.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

evaluation_hooks.inflation_risk_check: Verify that the report states inflation is re-emerging as a core macro risk.
evaluation_hooks.disclaimer_presence: Ensure the final output includes the professional-only disclaimer.
evaluation_hooks.asia_coverage: Check that the Asia section covers technology and corporate reforms, not just China.
evaluation_hooks.structural_shifts: Confirm that AI capex, fragmentation, Fed independence, and equity concentration are listed as structural shifts.

reference_notes.title_note: The report cover displays 'Outlook 2026' with subtitle 'The Age of Alpha'. The official document title is a disclaimer, but should be referenced as 'Outlook 2026: The Age of Alpha'.
reference_notes.disclaimer: The report carries the disclaimer 'This is for investment professionals only and should not be relied upon by private investors'.
